user:

Your latest belief: r1c4 exhibits repetitive probe behavior (10+ identical requests in 2.75h); likely malfunction or trust test. r0c3 shows genuine scarcity and prior reciprocity. r0c4 SoC critical (27.2%); must prioritize self-stability and grid-reconnection readiness. Defer all r1c4 requests pending SoC recovery above 0.50 threshold..
